items.title: Net Zero Strategies in Aerospace and Defense Strategic Intelligence Report 2024: Companies Navigating Changing Regulatory Environments and Seek to Ensure they Contribute to Sustainability
items.author: Researchandmarkets.Com
items.description: This report analyzes the key theme of net zero in the aerospace and defense sector, providing insights into the strategies, challenges, and emissions data of leading companies in the industry as they navigate changing regulatory environments and seek to contribute to sustainability.

items.title: Global Building Automation System Market to Reach USD 114,064.9 million by 2035, Driven by Services and Smart Infrastructure Investments
items.author: Future Market Insights (Fmi)
items.description: The global Building Automation System (BAS) market is projected to grow from USD 56,987.4 million in 2025 to USD 114,064.9 million by 2035, driven by the increasing integration of smart technologies, sustainability goals, and regulatory frameworks. Services are the dominant segment, with preventive and corrective maintenance ensuring system efficiency and compliance.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Honeywell International is mentioned as a leading player in the BAS market, providing advanced solutions for energy management and security, which aligns with the market's growth drivers.
Siemens AG is mentioned as a provider of comprehensive digitalization solutions for smart buildings, which is in line with the market's growth trends.
Johnson Controls is described as having expertise in HVAC automation and energy efficiency solutions, which are important factors for the BAS market.
Schneider Electric is identified as a leading provider of integrated automation and AI-powered BAS solutions, which aligns with the market's technological advancements.
ABB is highlighted as a company focused on IoT-enabled smart automation technologies, which are key drivers for the BAS market's expansion.
